Business Name: CAT Scale - Pilot Travel Center #602, Birmingham
Description: CAT Scale located at Pilot Travel Center #602, I-65 Exit 264, north Birmingham approach.

Business Name: Comfort Inn & Suites Fultondale Gardendale I-65
Description: Comfort Inn & Suites off I-65 in Fultondale (north Birmingham approach). Listed on truck-friendly lodging directories as offering truck/large-vehicle parking. Truck-space count and lot type not independently confirmed, so left blank.

Fuel/convenience truck stop at I-65 Exit 246 (AL-119 / Cahaba Valley Rd) in Pelham. Listed across truck directories as a truck stop with diesel, showers, a hosted CAT Scale and truck parking. Open 24 hours.
Certified CAT Scale co-located at the Circle K truck stop at I-65 Exit 246 (AL-119 / Cahaba Valley Rd), Pelham.

Business Name: Speed Trac Truck Stop (Calera Citgo/Speed Trac)
Description: Independent 24-hour truck stop on AL-25 (Highway 25) near I-65 Exit 228 in Calera. Directory and social listings describe diesel, showers, a 24/7 store/restaurant, truckers lounge, laundry and truck/overnight parking. Currently branded Citgo/Speed Trac.

Business Name: Speedway Travel Center — Finley Blvd, Birmingham
Description: New 24/7 Speedway travel center opened September 2024 at the Finley Blvd exit of I-65 (Exit 262B) in Birmingham, offering diesel and fuel. Described in local press as a full-service travel center.

Love's Travel Stop #368 on I-65 at Exit 208 in Clanton. 24-hour travel center with diesel, DEF, multiple diesel lanes, showers, Arby's restaurant, and dedicated truck parking. Co-located with a CAT Scale and a Love's Truck Care service center (listed separately).
Certified CAT Scale located on the lot of Love's Travel Stop #368, I-65 Exit 208, Clanton. Weigh service via 1-877-CAT-SCALE / Weigh My Truck app.

Love's Truck Care service center co-located at Love's Travel Stop #368, I-65 Exit 208, Clanton. Commercial tire sales/service (Hankook, Bridgestone, Michelin, Goodyear, Yokohama, Love's Retreads), oil change / PM, light mechanical, and roadside assistance.

Independent 24-hour truck stop on I-65 at Exit 219 (Jemison/Thorsby). 24-hour diesel, convenience store, Subway deli, truckers lounge, showers, reefer plug-ins, RV/truck parking on a lighted, paved lot.
Independent fuel stop / convenience store on I-65 at Exit 200 (Verbena) reported with 24-hour self-service fuel, store/deli, and truck parking.
Truck-friendly fuel stop on I-65 at Exit 181 (Millbrook) reported with diesel lanes, restrooms, ATM and a small amount of truck parking. No CAT scale.
Days Inn by Wyndham at I-65 Exit 205 in Clanton. Pet-friendly hotel with free breakfast, Wi-Fi and pool; reported to offer a small number of truck-size parking spaces.

TravelCenters of America full-service truck stop on the south side of Montgomery at I-65 Exit 168 (US-80/US-82). Country Pride restaurant, CAT scale, TA Truck Service shop, showers, and Reserve-It reserved parking.
Pilot Flying J-operated Flying J Travel Center at I-65 Exit 158 in Hope Hull (south of Montgomery). 24-hour full-service truck stop with CAT scale, Denny's, showers, and diesel/DEF lanes.

Love's Travel Stop at I-65 Exit 158 in Hope Hull (opened December 2017). 24-hour truck stop with CAT scale, three truck service bays (Love's Truck Care), showers, and Chester's Chicken / Godfather's Pizza / Subway.
Love's Travel Stop at I-65 Exit 93 (US-84) in Evergreen, Conecuh County. 24-hour truck stop with CAT scale, showers, and Arby's / Godfather's Pizza.
Independent (Roady's/NATSN network) travel center at I-65 Exit 69 (AL-41) near Brewton. 24-hour operation with C-store, Crossroad Cafe, diesel, showers, and truck parking.
CAT Scale located at the TA Montgomery travel center, I-65 Exit 168.
